State College of Education at Albany

SS

—™ Institute, Add 1

eee

The teachers will receive a fellowship from the Commiss‘on on “nglish and they will take courses in composition, literature, anda language. ‘Time will also be spent i: workshops developing materials and >recedures te be used in high-school English classes, uring the follewing sc'o@l year +hese procedures will be +ried and +heir effeetiveness will be s*udied.

"Although +he emphasis will be on classes for the college-bound students, each *eacher will adap+ +he materials Geveloped in +he Ins+i+ute for kis own vse and sme materials migh+ be applicable +o al! English classes," 1* was stated by +he werdinater of rndthes uve, Bavid W, Marvin, Assisran+ Professer of Educa+ion (English), 5y i-preving his ewn ability +o write and +e study literature and language, +h teacher

Should improve his teaching of *he same subjects +e his

a

high-scheol students,
